calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-21-2018 Off Calendar

Order To Show Cause
Off Calendar Feb-28-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Amy Kuo Alexander, Esq. 415-986-5900 of Gordon & Rees LLP for Defendant Glumac.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Unopposed. Defendant reports she has 2 versions of the proposed order. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Order To Show Cause hearing to deem this case abandoned is Granted.

Order deeming this case abandoned and award of sanctions to Glumac is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-25-2018 Continued To Jun-06-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-17-2017 Continued To Oct-04-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Action
Off Calendar Feb-03-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert M. Vantress, of Vantress Law Group, Tel. 408.905.6501, for plaintiffs;
Amy Kuo Alexander, of Gordon & Rees LLP, Tel. 415.986.5900, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT GLUMAC, Motion To Dismiss Action is DENIED. (See Brock v. Kaiser Foundation Hospitals (1992) 10 Cal.App.4th 1790.) However, the Court orders the parties to engage in meaningful mediation or arbitration proceedings forthwith. Order signed in open court. Judge: Richard Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Gena Eales, CSR No. 9176, email: geales@sftc.org; Dept. 302.

Glumac Notice Of Petition To Compel Arbitration And Motion To Stay
Off Calendar Jan-22-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. AMY K. ALEXANDER of Gordon & Rees, LLP, Tel No. (415) 986-5900 appearing for Defendant Glumac;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT GLUMAC'S Petition To Compel Arbitration And Motion To Stay is granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/AJR)
